channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Coolest Gadgets From MWC 2026
item.description: The mobile-focused show has some exciting new phones, tablets, and... humanoid robots?

item.title: Anthropic upgrades Claude’s memory to attract AI switchers
item.description: Anthropic is making it easier to switch to its Claude AI from other chatbots with an update that brings Claude's memory feature to users on the free plan, along with a new prompt and dedicated tool for importing data from other chatbots. These upgrades could allow users who have been using rivals like OpenAI's ChatGPT […]

item.title: Instagram tracked growing usage while targeting teens, lawyers argue
item.description: The company said usage grew from 40 minutes per day in 2023 to 46 minutes in 2026. Other documents referenced back teens a top priority for the app before asking existing users for birthdays.

item.title: Australia will consider requiring app stores to block AI services without age verification
item.description: Australia's government may take a strict stance on ensuring younger users cannot access AI chatbots. Reuters reports that Australian regulators may require app storefronts to block AI services that do not implement age verification for restricting mature content by March 9. "eSafety will use the full range of our powers where there is non-compliance," a representative for the commissioner said in a statement to the publication. Those paths could include "action in respect of gatekeeper services such as search engines and app stores that provide key points of access to particular ‌services."A r...

item.title: Elderly Woman Bombarded With Over a Hundred Amazon Packages She Didn’t Order
item.description: Jackpot or harassment? It's all in the eye of the beholder.

item.title: Anthropic brings memory to Claude's free plan
item.description: Anthropic is bringing another paid feature to Claude's free tier. The next time you chat with Claude, you'll have the option to have it reference your previous conversation to inform its outputs. Anthropic first made its chatbot capable of remembering past interactions last August, before giving it the ability to compartmentalize memories in the fall. Making memory a free feature is well-timed; earlier today Anthropic made it easier for users to import their past conversations with a competing chatbot to Claude. If after enabling memory you decide to turn it off, you can either pause the featu...

item.title: Samsung has quietly released a very special Galaxy S26 Ultra smartphone edition - and business customers will love it
item.description: Samsung releases enterprise Galaxy S26 Ultra with identical hardware, the same pricing in the US, and limited storage options in the UK market.

item.title: Apple’s cheapest AirPods have hit $89
item.description: It’s a good day for Apple fans on a budget. Not only did the company introduce a new budget phone, its entry-level AirPods 4 are also on sale. Right now, you can snag a pair of Apple’s AirPods 4 starting at just $89 ($30 off) at Walmart. The model with active noise-cancellation are also down […]

item.title: ‘Scream 7’ Somehow Had Even More Social Media Drama Left in It
item.description: The horror sequel overcame early production woes to score a big box-office haul, but apparently not every star got the memo about avoiding online controversy.

item.title: California's age verification law is proving controversial — here's what you need to know, and why some Linux distros are in the firing line
item.description: The legislation might prove to be a real headache for some Linux distros.

item.title: Missile Attacks Are Overwhelming the Gulf. Delivery Drivers Are Still on the Roads
item.description: Missile and drone attacks have disrupted daily life, but delivery drivers are still diligently navigating streets to drop off orders across the region.

item.title: Updating your security mindset: Keep your data private and your devices secure
item.description: When was the last time you thought hard about your digital security?

item.title: Call of Duty will add Black Ops Royale, a new free game mode coming March 13
item.description: Call of Duty is getting a new battle royale mode later this month. The popular first-person shooter will introduce Black Ops Royale as a free game mode on March 13. Black Ops Royale pays homage to Blackout, the series' first foray into a battle royale game mode back in CoD: Black Ops 4. Matches will have 100 players dropping in as four-person teams. The mode takes place on the massive Avalon map, but there will be no familiar Warzone features like loadouts, the gulag, or buy stations. Instead, it's all about the scavenging the weapons from the recent Black Ops 7 game and upgrading them. Accord...

item.title: YouTuber Designs Cooling System for 1.5 kW LED, Creates Small Artificial Sun
item.description: The 50-pound flashlight you've been waiting for.

item.title: The Race to Build the World’s First Commercial Fusion Plant Is Heating Up
item.description: Private and government stakeholders alike seem to believe that fusion energy is right around the corner.

item.title: Welcome to the age of combat via chatbot
item.description: We’re officially in the AI warfare era. It seems as if we have entered into the era of AI warfare that the movies always warned us about.

item.title: Two Vince Vaughns Star in a New Time-Travel Gangster Action Comedy
item.description: 'Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice' co-stars James Marsden, Eiza González, and Stephen Root. It's out March 27.

item.title: Intuit is betting its 40 years of small business data can outlast the SaaSpocalypse
item.description: Intuit has lost more than 40% of its market cap since the beginning of the year. It's not alone. Many established SaaS players have seen their stock prices fall in recent months, including Adobe and IBM — the latter experiencing its most significant one-day drop (roughly $40 billion) with Anthropic's announcement that Claude could now read, analyze and translate legacy COBOL into modern languages like Java and Python. The market has a name for it: the SaaSpocalypse.The argument from investors and market watchers: AI agents can now do bookkeeping, file taxes and reconcile accounts — without a h...

item.title: How to watch Como vs. Internazionale in the Coppa Italia online for free
item.description: How to watch Coppa Italia for free. Live stream Como vs. Internazionale in the 2026 Coppa Italia for free.

item.title: How to watch Sporting CP vs. Porto in the Taça de Portugal online for free
item.description: How to watch Taça de Portugal for free. Live stream Sporting CP vs. Porto in the 2026 Taça de Portugal for free.

item.title: How the new iPhone 17E stacks up against Apple’s pricier phones
item.description: The iPhone 17 lineup now has a “budget” option. Announced this week, the iPhone 17E will hit stores on Wednesday, March 11th, starting at $599, with preorders opening on March 4th. The 6.1-inch phone joins the rest of Apple’s iPhone 17 lineup, which includes the iPhone 17 ($799), the more powerful iPhone 17 Pro ($1,099), […]
